n : ℕ
hn : 0 < n
⊢ a (2 * n - 1) = 0

  suffices h : {p : Fin (2 * n - 1) → ℤˣ // A + ∑ i, (p i : Fin 8) = E} = ∅ by
    simp [h]
  ext p
  simp only [Set.mem_empty_iff_false, Subtype.exists, not_exists, not_and]
  intro hsum
  have hparity : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 2 = 1 := by
    have : (∑ i, (p i : ℤ)) % 2 = (∑ i, 1) % 2 := by
      apply Int.ModEq.sum
      intro i _
      have : (p i : ℤ) = 1 ∨ (p i : ℤ) = -1 := by
        have : (p i : ℤˣ) = 1 ∨ (p i : ℤˣ) = -1 := by
          have : Fintype.card (Fin 2) = 2 := by decide
          have : Fintype.card (Units ℤ) = 2 := by
            simp [Fintype.card_units_eq_two]
          have : (p i : ℤˣ) ∈ ({1, -1} : Set (ℤˣ)) := by
            simp [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
            exact Units.eq_one_or_neg_one (p i)
          simpa using this
        cases' this with h1 h2 <;> simp [h1, h2]
      cases' this with h1 h2 <;> simp [h1, h2]
    simp [this, Fin.sum_const, Fin.card_fin]
    omega
  have hE' : (E - A : ℤ) = 4 ∨ (E - A : ℤ) = -4 := by
    rw [hE]
    simp [Fin.val_add, Fin.val_eq_val, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]
    omega
  cases' hE' with hE' hE' <;> simp_all [Int.ModEq, Int.emod_eq_emod_iff_emod_sub_eq_zero]
  <;> omega

rw [ha_def]
  suffices : {p : Fin (2 * n - 1) → ℤˣ // A + ∑ i, (p i : Fin 8) = E} = ∅ by
    simp [this]
  ext p
  simp only [Subtype.mem_setOf_eq, Fin.val_add, Fin.val_sum, hE, Fin.val_eq_val, eq_self_iff_true,
    and_true, Fin.val_cast, Fin.val_one, Fin.val_zero]
  intro h
  have h₁ : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 8 = 4 := by
    simpa [Fin.ext_iff, hE] using congr_arg (· % 8) h
  have h₂ : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 2 = 0 := by
    have : ∀ i, (p i : ℤ) % 2 = 1 := by
      intro i
      fin_cases p i <;> simp [Int.units_inv, Int.units_mul, Int.ofNat_one, Int.ofNat_zero]
    simp [Finset.sum_mod, this]
  omega

rw [ha_def]
  suffices : ∀ p : Fin (2 * n - 1) → ℤˣ, A + ∑ i, (p i : Fin 8) ≠ E by
    simp_all [Fintype.card_empty]
  intro p
  have h : (∑ i, (p i : Fin 8)) % 2 = (2 * n - 1) % 2 := by
    have : ∀ i, (p i : Fin 8) % 2 = 1 := by
      intro i
      fin_cases p i <;> simp [Int.ofNat_eq_coe]
    simp [Finset.sum_const, this]
  rw [hE] at *
  omega

rw [ha_def]
  suffices : {p : Fin (2 * n - 1) → ℤˣ // A + ∑ i, (p i : Fin 8) = E} = ∅ by
    simp [this]
  ext p
  simp only [Subtype.mem, Set.mem_empty_iff_false, iff_false]
  intro h
  have h₁ : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : Fin 8)) = E - A := by
    simpa [add_comm, add_left_inj] using h
  rw [hE] at h₁
  have h₂ : E - A = 4 := by
    rw [hE]; simp
  rw [h₂] at h₁
  have h₃ : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 8 = 4 % 8 := by
    exact_mod_cast h₁
  have h₄ : ∀ i, (p i : ℤ) = 1 ∨ (p i : ℤ) = -1 := by
    intro i
    have : (p i : ℤˣ) = 1 ∨ (p i : ℤˣ) = -1 := by
      have : (p i : ℤˣ) ∈ ({1, -1} : Set ℤˣ) := by
        exact units_eq_one_or_neg_one (p i)
      simpa using this
    cases' this with h h <;> simp [h]
  have h₅ : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 2 = (2 * n - 1) % 2 := by
    have : (∑ i, (p i : ℤ)) % 2 = (∑ i, ((p i : ℤ) % 2)) % 2 := by
      simp [Int.sum_emod]
    rw [this]
    apply Eq.symm
    apply Eq.symm
    simp [h₄, Int.add_emod, Int.emod_emod]
  have h₆ : (2 * n - 1) % 2 = 1 := by
    omega
  have h₇ : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 2 = 1 := by
    rw [h₅, h₆]
  have h₈ : 4 % 2 = 0 := by
    norm_num
  have h₉ : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 2 = 0 := by
    rw [← h₃]
    simp [h₈]
  omega

rw [ha_def]
  suffices h : {p : Fin (2 * n - 1) → ℤˣ // A + ∑ i, (p i : Fin 8) = E} = ∅ by
    simp [h]
  ext p
  simp only [Fin.val_add, Fin.val_succ, Fin.val_zero, Fin.add_eq_add] at *
  have h₁ : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 8 = 4 := by
    rw [← Fin.val_eq_val, ← hE]
    simp [Fin.add_eq_add, Fin.val_add, Fin.val_succ, Fin.val_zero]
    omega
  have h₂ : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 2 = 1 := by
    have : ∀ i, (p i : ℤ) % 2 = 1 := by
      intro i
      fin_cases p i <;> simp [Int.units_inv, Int.units_mul, Int.ofNat_one, Int.ofNat_succ]
    simp [Finset.sum_mod, this]
    omega
  omega

rw [ha_def]
  suffices h : {p : Fin (2 * n - 1) → ℤˣ // A + ∑ i, (p i : Fin 8) = E} = ∅ by
    simp [h]
  ext p
  simp only [Subtype.mem_setOf_eq, Fin.val_add, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, Fin.val_cast]
  intro hsum
  have hparity : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 2 = 1 := by
    have : (∑ i, (p i : ℤ)) % 2 = (∑ i, 1) % 2 := by
      apply Finset.sum_mod_eq_sum_mod
      intro i _
      have : (p i : ℤ) = 1 ∨ (p i : ℤ) = -1 := by
        have := p i
        fin_cases this <;> simp
      cases this <;> simp [*]
    simp [this, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin]
  have : (A + ∑ i, (p i : Fin 8) : Fin 8) = E := hsum
  rw [hE] at this
  have : (∑ i, (p i : ℤ)) % 8 = 4 := by
    rw [← Fin.val_eq_val, Fin.val_add, Fin.val_add] at this
    simp_all [Fin.val_eq_val]
    omega
  omega

rw [ha_def]
  suffices : {p : Fin (2 * n - 1) → ℤˣ // A + ∑ i, (p i : Fin 8) = E} = ∅ by
    simp [this]
  ext p
  simp only [Subtype.mem_setOf_eq, Fin.val_add, Fin.val_one, Fin.val_zero, hE]
  intro h
  have h₁ : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 8 = 4 := by
    simpa [Fin.ext_iff, hE] using congr_arg (· % 8) h
  have h₂ : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 2 = 1 := by
    have : ∀ i, (p i : ℤ) % 2 = 1 := by
      intro i
      have : (p i : ℤˣ) = 1 ∨ (p i : ℤˣ) = -1 := by
        have := (units_eq_one_or_neg_one (p i))
        aesop
      cases' this with hpi hpi <;> simp [hpi]
    simp [Finset.sum_mod, this]
  have h₃ : 4 % 2 = 0 := by norm_num
  have h₄ : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 2 = 0 := by
    rw [← h₁]
    simp [h₃]
  contradiction

rw [ha_def]
  suffices h : {p : Fin (2 * n - 1) → ℤˣ // A + ∑ i, (p i : Fin 8) = E} = ∅ by
    simp [h]
  ext p
  simp only [Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_fin, Nat.cast_zero, zero_add, ne_eq, not_false_eq_true]
  intro hsum
  have hparity : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) % 2 = 1 := by
    have : (2 * n - 1 : ℤ) % 2 = 1 := by
      omega
    simpa [Fin.sum_univ_cast] using this
  have hE' : (E - A : ℤ) = 4 := by
    rw [hE]; simp [Fin.val_add]
  have hsum' : (∑ i : Fin (2 * n - 1), (p i : ℤ)) = 4 + 8 * k := by
    use (E - A - ∑ i, (p i : Fin 8)).val / 8
    omega
  omega
